nasb.text: Their horses are swifter than leopards And keener than wolves in the evening. Their horsemen come galloping, Their horsemen come from afar; They fly like an eagle swooping down to devour.

esv.text: Their horses are swifter than leopards, more fierce than the evening wolves; their horsemen press proudly on. Their horsemen come from afar; they fly like an eagle swift to devour.

cnv.text: 他們的馬比豹更快，比晚上的豺狼更猛。 他們的騎兵奔馳，自遠而來； 他們如鷹飛翔，迅速吞噬。

ccb.text: “他们的马比豹子还快， 比夜狼还猛。 他们的骑兵从远方飞驰而来， 如鹰扑食。
